headline: Does BNY’s Snapdocs Mortgage Automation Push Quietly Redefine Its Digital Efficiency Story (BK)?
summary: On 14 May 2026, Snapdocs announced an initiative with BNY to create an automated, end-to-end digital mortgage collateral infrastructure using BNY’s custody capabilities and Snapdocs’ eVault, document intelligence, and data extraction tools. This partnership aims to replace manual, paper-based collateral delivery with secure, touchless workflows, potentially lowering per-loan operational costs and enabling BNY to extend eCustody infrastructure beyond mortgages into additional asset...
